creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgollucci    2010-09-23 03:44:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    GIDs UIDs 
    sysutils             Makefile 
  Added files:
    sysutils/backuppc    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    sysutils/backuppc/files backuppc.in patch-configure.pl 
  Log:
  BackupPC is a high-performance, enterprise-grade system for backing up Linux,
  WinXX and MacOSX PCs and laptops to a server's disk.
  BackupPC is highly configurable and easy to install and maintain.
  
  PR:             ports/149907
  Submitted by:   Alexander Moisseev <moiseev@mezonplus.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.105     +2 -1      ports/GIDs
  1.121     +2 -1      ports/UIDs
  1.1230    +1 -0      ports/sysutils/Makefile
  1.1       +116 -0    ports/sysutils/backuppc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/sysutils/backuppc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/sysutils/backuppc/files/backuppc.in (new)
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/sysutils/backuppc/files/patch-configure.pl (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/sysutils/backuppc/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +140 -0    ports/sysutils/backuppc/pkg-plist (new)
